company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that helps YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok creators automate their video editing workflow using AI — saving hours of manual work every week.

plans.name: Basic
plans.best_for: Hobbyists and new creators starting out

policies.refund_policy: Refunds are available within the first 7 days of purchase. After 7 days, all sales are final.

support.basic_plan: Email support with a 48-hour response time.
support.pro_plan: 24/7 live chat and phone support with priority queuing.

policies.free_trial: AutoStream offers a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan — no credit card required.
policies.billing: All plans are billed monthly. Annual billing is available at a 20% discount.

faqs.question: Can I switch plans later?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok, Facebook, and Twitter/X — with optimized export settings for each.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What video formats are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream accepts MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV as input formats.
